away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Paige Bueckers
players.injury_comment: Bueckers had a season-high 31 points in Thursday's 85-70 win over Phoenix, though she briefly exited the contest because of an ankle injury. There's always a chance the team could take the cautious approach and hold her out for Saturday's meeting with Portland. If that's the case, Aziaha James and Alanna Smith could see more action.

players.name: Odyssey Sims
players.injury_comment: Sims exited last Friday's win over the Sparks in a wheelchair and has been ruled out for a third consecutive contest due to a left ankle injury. She is without a clear timetable for a return and can be considered week-to-week until the Wings offer an update on her status.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Carla Leite
players.injury_comment: Leite had 18 points, eight assists, three rebounds and one steal across 28 minutes in Thursday's 105-89 loss to the Aces. The 22-year-old is listed as probable for Saturday's meeting with Dallas, meaning should be on the floor. However, it Leite can't suit up, Frieda Buhner, Karlie Samuelson and Holly Winterburn could see expanded action.

players.name: Nyadiew Puoch
players.injury_comment: Puoch is in danger of missing her first game of the season due to a left ankle sprain. If the rookie forward is ultimately ruled out, Frieda Buhner and Emily Engstler would be candidates for increased playing time.
